## Summary

- describe the change
- call out user-facing behavior changes

## Testing

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run type-check`
- [ ] `bun run test`

## Docs And Changelog

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for public behavior changes
- [ ] Updated README/docs/examples where needed

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change described here

## Notes

- migration guidance, rollout notes, or follow-ups
